# SummarisedResult { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult }

```python
SummarisedResult(results=None, settings=None)
```

Container for a summarised result (results table + settings table).

Mirrors the omopgenerics ``summarised_result`` class. Provides methods for
filtering, splitting, tidying, suppressing, and combining results.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [settings](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.settings) | Return the settings table. |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [add_settings](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.add_settings) | Add or update columns in the settings table. |
| [additional_columns](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.additional_columns) | Return unique additional_name values (excluding 'overall'). |
| [combine_strata](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.combine_strata) | Combine multiple strata columns into a single compound strata. |
| [filter_additional](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_additional) | Filter results by additional_name/additional_level pairs. |
| [filter_group](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_group) | Filter results by group_name/group_level pairs. |
| [filter_settings](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_settings) | Filter results by settings column values. |
| [filter_strata](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_strata) | Filter results by strata_name/strata_level pairs. |
| [group_columns](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.group_columns) | Return unique group_name values (excluding 'overall'). |
| [is_result_suppressed](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.is_result_suppressed) | Check if this result has been suppressed. |
| [pivot_estimates](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.pivot_estimates) | Pivot estimate_name into columns with estimate_value as values. |
| [settings_columns](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.settings_columns) | Return non-standard settings column names. |
| [split_additional](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_additional) | Split additional_name/additional_level into separate columns. |
| [split_all](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_all) | Split all dimensions (group, strata, additional) into separate columns. |
| [split_group](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_group) | Split group_name/group_level into separate columns. |
| [split_strata](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_strata) | Split strata_name/strata_level into separate columns. |
| [strata_columns](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.strata_columns) | Return unique strata_name values (excluding 'overall'). |
| [suppress](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.suppress) | Suppress results below the minimum cell count. |
| [tidy](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.tidy) | Convert to tidy (wide) format. |
| [tidy_columns](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.tidy_columns) | Return the column names that would appear after tidy(). |
| [unite_additional](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.unite_additional) | Recombine individual additional columns back into additional_name/additional_level. |
| [unite_group](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.unite_group) | Recombine individual group columns back into group_name/group_level. |
| [unite_strata](#cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.unite_strata) | Recombine individual strata columns back into strata_name/strata_level. |

### add_settings { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.add_settings }

```python
SummarisedResult.add_settings(**kwargs)
```

Add or update columns in the settings table.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type   | Description                                   | Default   |
|----------|--------|-----------------------------------------------|-----------|
| **kwargs | str    | Column name / value pairs to add to settings. | `{}`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### additional_columns { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.additional_columns }

```python
SummarisedResult.additional_columns()
```

Return unique additional_name values (excluding 'overall').

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type        | Description   |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
|        | list\[str\] |               |

### combine_strata { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.combine_strata }

```python
SummarisedResult.combine_strata(*columns)
```

Combine multiple strata columns into a single compound strata.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type   | Description                          | Default   |
|----------|--------|--------------------------------------|-----------|
| *columns | str    | Column names to combine into strata. | `()`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### filter_additional { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_additional }

```python
SummarisedResult.filter_additional(**kwargs)
```

Filter results by additional_name/additional_level pairs.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type   | Description                                                                                      | Default   |
|----------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| **kwargs | Any    | Pairs where key is the additional_name value and value is the additional_level value(s) to keep. | `{}`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### filter_group { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_group }

```python
SummarisedResult.filter_group(**kwargs)
```

Filter results by group_name/group_level pairs.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type   | Description                                                                            | Default   |
|----------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| **kwargs | Any    | Pairs where key is the group_name value and value is the group_level value(s) to keep. | `{}`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### filter_settings { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_settings }

```python
SummarisedResult.filter_settings(**kwargs)
```

Filter results by settings column values.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type   | Description                                                                                                  | Default   |
|----------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| **kwargs | Any    | Column name / value pairs to filter the settings table by. Values can be a single value or a list of values. | `{}`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description      |
|--------|------------------|------------------|
|        | SummarisedResult | Filtered result. |

### filter_strata { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.filter_strata }

```python
SummarisedResult.filter_strata(**kwargs)
```

Filter results by strata_name/strata_level pairs.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type   | Description                                                                              | Default   |
|----------|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| **kwargs | Any    | Pairs where key is the strata_name value and value is the strata_level value(s) to keep. | `{}`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### group_columns { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.group_columns }

```python
SummarisedResult.group_columns()
```

Return unique group_name values (excluding 'overall').

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type        | Description   |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
|        | list\[str\] |               |

### is_result_suppressed { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.is_result_suppressed }

```python
SummarisedResult.is_result_suppressed()
```

Check if this result has been suppressed.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                            |
|--------|--------|----------------------------------------|
|        | bool   | True if min_cell_count setting is > 0. |

### pivot_estimates { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.pivot_estimates }

```python
SummarisedResult.pivot_estimates()
```

Pivot estimate_name into columns with estimate_value as values.

Similar to tidy() but does not split dimensions or merge settings.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |

### settings_columns { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.settings_columns }

```python
SummarisedResult.settings_columns()
```

Return non-standard settings column names.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type        | Description   |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
|        | list\[str\] |               |

### split_additional { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_additional }

```python
SummarisedResult.split_additional()
```

Split additional_name/additional_level into separate columns.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |

### split_all { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_all }

```python
SummarisedResult.split_all()
```

Split all dimensions (group, strata, additional) into separate columns.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |

### split_group { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_group }

```python
SummarisedResult.split_group()
```

Split group_name/group_level into separate columns.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                         |
|--------|------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Results with group_name/group_level replaced by individual columns. |

### split_strata { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.split_strata }

```python
SummarisedResult.split_strata()
```

Split strata_name/strata_level into separate columns.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |

### strata_columns { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.strata_columns }

```python
SummarisedResult.strata_columns()
```

Return unique strata_name values (excluding 'overall').

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type        | Description   |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
|        | list\[str\] |               |

### suppress { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.suppress }

```python
SummarisedResult.suppress(min_cell_count=5)
```

Suppress results below the minimum cell count.

Replaces estimate_value with NA for numeric estimates where the
count is below min_cell_count, and obscures the exact count.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name           | Type   | Description                               | Default   |
|----------------|--------|-------------------------------------------|-----------|
| min_cell_count | int    | Minimum cell count threshold (default 5). | `5`       |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### tidy { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.tidy }

```python
SummarisedResult.tidy()
```

Convert to tidy (wide) format.

Splits all dimensions and pivots estimate_name into columns with
values from estimate_value.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |

### tidy_columns { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.tidy_columns }

```python
SummarisedResult.tidy_columns()
```

Return the column names that would appear after tidy().

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type        | Description   |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
|        | list\[str\] |               |

### unite_additional { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.unite_additional }

```python
SummarisedResult.unite_additional()
```

Recombine individual additional columns back into additional_name/additional_level.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### unite_group { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.unite_group }

```python
SummarisedResult.unite_group()
```

Recombine individual group columns back into group_name/group_level.

Reverses the effect of split_group. Finds columns that were produced
by splitting and re-merges them into the ``group_name`` /
``group_level`` compound format.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |

### unite_strata { #cdmconnector.SummarisedResult.unite_strata }

```python
SummarisedResult.unite_strata()
```

Recombine individual strata columns back into strata_name/strata_level.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |
